title: Khurnak Fort
tagline: Khurnak Fort — heritage city of Ladakh (UT)

overview.short: The Khurnak Fort (Tibetan: མཁར་ནག, Wylie: mkhar nag, THL: khar nak) is a ruined fort on the northern shore of Pangong Lake, which spans eastern Ladakh in India and Rutog County in
overview.description: The Khurnak Fort (Tibetan: མཁར་ནག, Wylie: mkhar nag, THL: khar nak) is a ruined fort on the northern shore of Pangong Lake, which spans eastern Ladakh in India and Rutog County in the Tibet region of China. The area of the Khurnak Fort is disputed by India and China, and has been under Chinese administration since 1958. Though the ruined fort itself is not of much significance, it serves as a landmark denoting the middle of Pangong Lake. The fort lies at the western edge of a large plain formed as the alluvial fan of a river called Changlung Lungpa, which falls into Pangong Lake from the north

topPlaces.name: Pangong Tso
topPlaces.description: Pangong Tso or Pangong Lake (Tibetan: སྤང་གོང་མཚོ; Chinese: 班公错; pinyin: Bān gōng cuò) is an endorheic lake spanning eastern Ladakh and West Tibet situated at an elevation of 4,225 m (13,862 ft). It is 134 km (83 mi) long.

items.note: Pangong Tso or Pangong Lake (Tibetan: སྤང་གོང་མཚོ; Chinese: 班公错; pinyin: Bān gōng cuò) is an endorheic lake spanning eastern Ladakh and West Tibet situated at an elevation of 4,225 m (13,862 ft). It is 134 km (83 mi) long.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Khurnak Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Khurnak Fort is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Khurnak Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kushok Bakula Rimpochee Airport, Leh (139 km) and the nearest railway station is Katra (Vaishno Devi railhead) (385 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Khurnak Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Khurnak Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Khurnak Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Khurnak Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Khurnak Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pangong Tso.
